overview: Chain File is a decentralized file storage and sharing app on the Internet Computer. Users can upload, organize, and share files securely using unique access codes, with folder and tag organization, integrated crypto payments, and full file history tracking.
features: Secure file uploads with unique access codes
Folder and tag organization for documents
Auto-colored tag pills on document cards
Crypto payments (ICP, ckBTC, ckETH) for storage beyond 1 GB
File history with on-chain hash tracking
File preview for images, PDFs, and text
